title: Building on AWS to Learn AWS: A Professional Study Project
excerpt: I've worked with cloud for years, but studying for the AWS Solutions Architect Professional made me realize there's a gap between using services and understanding them. So I built a tool that forces me to use them all.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: The One-Page Dashboard: Why TUI Apps Still Matter for Cloud Operations
excerpt: In a world of web dashboards and SaaS platforms, the terminal remains the fastest path from question to answer. This is why AwsViz has a TUI, and how it gives operators what the Console cannot.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: Documentation-First Development with AI: How Ideas Become Architecture
excerpt: I prefer to RTFM over vibe coding. This is how I use AI to turn documented ideas into working software, while keeping the documentation as the source of truth.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: Architecture for Change: Applying Volatility-Based Decomposition to a Real Project
excerpt: Most software architecture is designed around what the system does. AwsViz is designed around what might change. This is the architecture of a system built to absorb change.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: Why the AWS Console Is Not Enough: Building the Dashboard I Actually Need
excerpt: After years of clicking through the AWS Console, piping CLI output through jq, and stitching together Grafana dashboards, I decided to build the tool I've been wanting. This is why.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: The Future of Intelligent Systems: Where We're Headed and Why It Matters
excerpt: A thoughtful exploration of where AI, cloud, and architecture are going—and how organizations can prepare for the next wave of intelligent systems.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: Building AI-Ready Architectures on Azure
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to preparing enterprise systems for AI integration using Microsoft Azure's cloud platform and services.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: From Monolith to Microservices: Lessons from the Trenches
excerpt: Real-world insights from modernizing legacy systems and the trade-offs involved when breaking down monolithic applications into microservices.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: Leading Tech Teams Through Change: What I've Learned
excerpt: Reflections on managing teams through digital transformation and uncertainty, with practical advice for tech leaders facing similar challenges.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: From Idea to Impact: Rapid Prototyping with Azure OpenAI and Copilot Studio
excerpt: A practical walkthrough showing how to turn concepts into working solutions quickly using Azure's AI services.
author: Jonathan Solarz

title: Architect as a Translator: Bridging Business and Engineering
excerpt: How effective software architects turn business needs into technical solutions—and why that translation role is critical for organizational success.
author: Jonathan Solarz
